hero.subtitle: AI-powered coffee reading, tarot, palm reading, dream interpretation & horoscope.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Shed light on your future in three steps.

testimonials.title: User Testimonials
testimonials.review1: "The AI interpretations are incredibly accurate! Coffee reading is just unbelievable."
testimonials.review2: "The Tarot readings are eerily accurate. Best fortune app I've used so far."
testimonials.review3: "I can't start my day without reading the daily horoscopes. Very sleek design."

privacy.privacyDesc: Your data is protected with military-grade encryption. No third-party sharing.
privacy.tosDesc: Detailed information about subscription and usage terms can be found here.
privacy.dataDesc: Your data is only processed for reading purposes and privacy is our priority.

cta.desc: Join hundreds of thousands and shed light on your future with the power of AI.

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.content: We collect your name, date of birth, and app usage data to provide Fortune AI services. This data is necessary to provide you with more accurate fortune-telling interpretations.

useOfData.title: Use of Data
useOfData.content: We use your data to train our AI models, personalize the user experience, and troubleshoot technical errors.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.content: Your personal data is never sold to third parties. It may only be shared anonymously with trusted business partners providing cloud storage and analytics services.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember app preferences and ensure session security.

security.title: Security
security.content: Your data is protected using industry-standard encryption methods (SSL/TLS). Our servers are hosted in high-security data centers.

rights.title: Rights
rights.content: Under KVKK and GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, and request the deletion of your data.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: You can contact us for any questions about our privacy policy:

section1.title: 1. Service Description
section1.content: Fortune AI provides astrology and AI-based insights. The content provided is for entertainment purposes only and does not constitute professional advice.

section2.title: 2. Account Creation
section2.content: Users must provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration. You are responsible for the security of your account.

section3.title: 3. Payments
section3.content: Payments for premium services are based on specified tariffs. Fees are non-refundable, except where legal withdrawal rights apply.

section4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
section4.content: The Fortune AI logo, design, and generated texts are under our intellectual property rights. They cannot be copied or used for commercial purposes without permission.

section5.title: 5. Rules of Conduct
section5.content: It is prohibited to use the service for illegal purposes, attempt to harm the system, or harass other users.

section6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
section6.content: Fortune AI does not guarantee the accuracy of predictions. The company cannot be held liable for any damages resulting from decisions made based on these predictions.

section7.title: 7. Changes to Terms
section7.content: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Changes become effective as soon as they are published.

section8.title: 8. Contact Us
section8.content: For your questions, you can contact us via legal@fortune-ai.com.

header.title: Data Protection Notice
header.subtitle: Your privacy is written in the stars, but secured by technology. Learn how we handle your cosmic data.

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.content: Fortune AI Technology Inc. acts as the data controller in accordance with Law No. 6698. Our company is registered at the following address: Istanbul Tech Valley, No: 44.

methods.title: Methods & Purposes
methods.content: Data is collected through digital forms and mobile application interfaces automatically. Purposes include enhancing AI accuracy and providing personalized horoscopes.

transfers.title: Data Transfers
transfers.content: Your data is not shared with third-party advertisers. Transfers are limited to cloud infrastructure providers (AWS/Google Cloud) located in Turkey or GDPR-compliant regions.

header.title: Contact Us
header.subtitle: We are here for your questions. Our team will get back to you shortly.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Fortune AI protects your data with end-to-end encryption. No personal data is shared with third parties.
faq.a2: If you are not satisfied, you can request a refund within the first 14 days.
faq.a3: You can access our GDPR-compliant data processing policy on the privacy page.
